title: GEEZY Large Anthracite Round Flower Pot – 39cm Textured Plant Tub for Indoor & Outdoor Use, Lightweight & Durable Plastic Planter, Ideal Garden & Indoor Plant Pots for Home Decor
features: CHARMING DESIGN: This Large Anthracite Round Flower Pot features a classic anthracite color with a textured stripe pattern, offering a contemporary and elegant look. Perfect for enhancing any home decor, this flower pot allows you to express your creativity.

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: Crafted from durable plastic, this plant pot is lightweight, making it easy to move and rearrange in your indoor or outdoor spaces. Ideal for those who enjoy frequently changing their garden layout.

DURABLE MATERIAL: Made from robust materials, this flower pot ensures long-lasting use. Its durable construction withstands various weather conditions, making it suitable for both indoor plant pots and outdoor plant pots.

VERSATILE USE: With a 31 cm height and a round 39x39 cm design, this planter is ideal for garden pots, plant tubs, or as indoor flower pots. A great gift for gardening enthusiasts on occasions like housewarmings or birthdays.
